scripts.build: npm run check-node && npm run build -w backend && npm run build:qt
scripts.dev:legacy: npm run check-node && concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND,ELECTRON -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://127.0.0.1:3333/api/health && npm run electron -w frontend"
scripts.build:legacy: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf node_modules frontend/node_modules backend/node_modules package-lock.json frontend/package-lock.json backend/package-lock.json
